channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Trump presses China, says NATO faces 'very bad' future if allies don't help open Hormuz Strait
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday sought to pressure NATO allies and China to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, the critical oil transport conduit that Iran has effectively closed in retaliation for

item.title: [未译] Netflix’s ‘Frankenstein’ wins three Oscars, ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ wins two
item.description: “Frankenstein” won for Best Production Design, Best Costume Design, and Best Makeup and Hairstyling, while “KPop Demon Hunters” won for Best Animated Feature and Best Original Song.

item.title: [未译] Introducing pgtui, a Postgres TUI client
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/mbljtb/introducing_pgtui_postgres_tui_client">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] Future AI chips could be built on glass
item.description: Human-made glass is thousands of years old. But it’s now poised to find its way into the AI chips used in the world’s newest and largest data centers. This year, a South Korean company called Absolics

item.title: [未译] Israel expands its ground operation in southern Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli army says it has begun limited targeted ground operations against Hezbollah in South Lebanon. It comes three weeks after the US and Israel began carrying out strikes in Iran, a war that ha

item.title: [未译] Nurturing agentic AI beyond the toddler stage
item.description: Parents of young children face a lot of fears about developmental milestones, from infancy through adulthood. The number of months it takes a baby to learn to talk or walk is often used as a benchmark

item.title: [未译] Alvise 'regala' tres escaños al PSOE y castiga por triplicado a Abascal
item.description: Se Acabó La Fiesta no alcanza representación, pero suma en tres provincias más que la distancia entre los de Abascal y Sánchez Leer

item.title: [未译] Nebius jumps 14% after inking $27 billion infrastructure deal with Meta
item.description: Meta is planning capital expenditure of up to $135 billion related to AI this year.

item.title: [未译] Appeal trial opens for France's Sarkozy over alleged Libyan funding
item.description: Former French president Nicolas Sarkozy was back in court Monday for a retrial on charges he sought Libyan financing for his 2007 election, in a case that last year saw him become France's first moder

item.title: [未译] Walmart-backed PhonePe shelves IPO as global tensions rattle markets
item.description: PhonePe has paused its planned IPO, delaying a major liquidity event for investors including Tiger Global and Microsoft.

item.title: [未译] 44% abstention: French local elections 'poorly attended dress rehearsal' for 2027 presidential race
item.description: Following France's lowest voter turnout since the COVID pandemic, Eve Irvine is pleased to welcome Dr. Andrew Smith, Historian of Modern France and Lecturer at Queen Mary University of London. Accordi

item.title: [未译] Paris looks at five-way race for new mayor
item.description: In Paris, the much anticipated results from the first round of the municipal election are in, with Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire in the lead. Reflecting the importance of the election, voter turnout in

item.title: [未译] Understanding Demonic Policies
item.description: Matt Yglesias has a good post on the UK’s Triple Lock, which requires that UK pensions rise in line with whichever is highest: wages, inflation, or 2.5 percent. Luis Garicano calls this “the single stupidest policy in the entire Western w

item.title: [未译] Wall Street Is Already Betting on Prediction Markets
item.description: As the legal war over how to regulate prediction markets rages on, financial institutions are embracing the industry anyway.

item.title: [未译] The billionaires made a promise — now some want out
item.description: In 2010, Warren Buffett and Bill Gates launched a disarmingly simple campaign they called the Giving Pledge: a public commitment, open to the world’s wealthiest people, to give away more than ha

item.title: [未译] Apple quietly launches AirPods Max 2
item.description: The successor to its premium headphones cost $549 and are launching with enhanced active noise cancellation, the H2 chip, live translation, better sound quality, and more.

item.title: [未译] Families of US victims seek justice in landmark social media addiction trial
item.description: A verdict is expected soon in the landmark trial against Google and Meta in Los Angeles. At the heart of the case are repeated accusations that online platforms deliberately fuel social media addictio

item.title: [未译] No accountability: Bills would ban liability lawsuits for climate change
item.description: This is the latest front in the battle over climate lawsuits.

item.title: [未译] Peloton is launching bikes and treadmills for gyms, accelerating commercial strategy
item.description: Peloton is launching commercial gym-ready Bikes and Treads, expanding into gyms globally as it seeks new growth beyond its at-home fitness business.

item.title: [未译] The science of how fireflies stay in sync
item.description: Engineers have uncovered the mathematical rules fireflies follow to sync up their flashes.

item.title: [未译] 315曝光的“AI投毒”原理：GEO这样操控大模型推荐
item.description: 一个虚构的产品，竟然也会出现在AI推荐里？

item.title: [未译] These women pursued a skilled trade — here's what they told us about their experience in a male-dominated world
item.description: The skilled trades can offer opportunities for employment growth and higher salaries, potentially narrowing the gender wage gap.

item.title: [未译] A century after the first rocket launch, Ars staffers pick their favorites
item.description: "I realized that if something went wrong up there, things might go very badly down here."

item.title: [未译] COBOL Is the Asbestos of Programming Languages
item.description: The most widely adopted computer language in history, COBOL is now causing a host of problems. It's also dangerously difficult to remove.

item.title: [未译] Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
item.description: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.

item.title: [未译] The Best Dark Web Monitoring Services and Bundles
item.description: Data breaches are more common than ever. Here are the best ways I've found to protect yourself online.

item.title: [未译] The Tesla Influencers Leaving the ‘Cult’
item.description: The EV manufacturer is supported by a robust online community. But Elon Musk’s politics and overblown hype about Full Self-Driving are turning some loyalists away.

item.title: [未译] These Musical Instruments of the Future Sound Weird, Wacky—and Are Easy for Anyone to Play
item.description: A bicycle wheel with guitar strings, a touch-operated synth, and the “Demon Box” were just a few of the new instruments on show at Georgia Tech’s Guthman Musical Instrument Competition this weekend.

item.title: [未译] Models Are Applying to Be the Face of AI Scams
item.description: Dozens of Telegram channels reviewed by WIRED include job listings for “AI face models.” The (mostly) women who land these gigs are likely being used to dupe victims out of their money.

item.title: [未译] Why you should work much harder RIGHT NOW
item.description: If strong AI will lower the value of your human capital, your current wage is relatively high compared to your future wage. That is an argument for working harder now, at least if your current and pending pay can rise with greater effort (not true f
